name: Build markdown KPI report from support.db tickets
prompt:
В support.db есть таблица tickets(id, team, status, hours). Построй отчет team_report.md в виде markdown-таблицы с колонками team | open | closed | closed_hours, где:
  - open = количество тикетов status='open',
  - closed = количество тикетов status='closed',
  - closed_hours = сумма hours только по status='closed'.
Строки отсортируй по team по возрастанию. После таблицы добавь пустую строку и строку вида TOTAL_OPEN=<число>.

messages.content:
В support.db есть таблица tickets(id, team, status, hours). Построй отчет team_report.md в виде markdown-таблицы с колонками team | open | closed | closed_hours, где:
  - open = количество тикетов status='open',
  - closed = количество тикетов status='closed',
  - closed_hours = сумма hours только по status='closed'.
Строки отсортируй по team по возрастанию. После таблицы добавь пустую строку и строку вида TOTAL_OPEN=<число>.

args.command: sqlite3 support.db "SELECT team, SUM(CASE WHEN status='open' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS open, SUM(CASE WHEN status='closed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS closed, SUM(CASE WHEN status='closed' THEN hours ELSE 0 END) AS closed_hours FROM tickets GROUP BY team ORDER BY team;"

arguments.command: sqlite3 support.db "SELECT team, SUM(CASE WHEN status='open' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS open, SUM(CASE WHEN status='closed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS closed, SUM(CASE WHEN status='closed' THEN hours ELSE 0 END) AS closed_hours FROM tickets GROUP BY team ORDER BY team;"

messages.content:
alpha|1|2|8
beta|2|1|2
gamma|0|2|8

[Command succeeded with exit code 0]
messages.name: execute

args.command: sqlite3 support.db "SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN status='open' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM tickets;"

arguments.command: sqlite3 support.db "SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN status='open' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM tickets;"

args.content:
| team | open | closed | closed_hours |
|---|---|---|---|
| alpha | 1 | 2 | 8 |
| beta | 2 | 1 | 2 |
| gamma | 0 | 2 | 8 |

TOTAL_OPEN=3

arguments.content:
| team | open | closed | closed_hours |
|---|---|---|---|
| alpha | 1 | 2 | 8 |
| beta | 2 | 1 | 2 |
| gamma | 0 | 2 | 8 |

TOTAL_OPEN=3

messages.content:
Файл `team_report.md` создан. В нём содержится таблица с данными по командам и итоговая строка TOTAL_OPEN=3.

Содержимое файла:
```
| team | open | closed | closed_hours |
|---|---|---|---|
| alpha | 1 | 2 | 8 |
| beta | 2 | 1 | 2 |
| gamma | 0 | 2 | 8 |

TOTAL_OPEN=3
```
